title: Design, Packaging, and Sustainability Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To feel very happy and excited, especially because of a success or victory.
choices: exult
usurp
obstruct
rounds.answer: exult
rounds.explanation: exult: To feel very happy and excited, especially because of a success or victory.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To speak to someone in a way that shows you are angry because they did something wrong.
choices: exult
usurp
rebuke
rounds.answer: rebuke
rounds.explanation: rebuke: To speak to someone in a way that shows you are angry because they did something wrong.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Very skilled or good at something.
choices: usurp
adept
exult
rounds.answer: adept
rounds.explanation: adept: Very skilled or good at something.

games.title: Language Choice
